subcodes.title: Public address to Advanced Thought Center, spoken on 1912-04-14
subcodes.first_line: I have come from distant lands in order to visit the assemblies and meetings.... the greatest bestowal of God is love
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از ممالک بعیده آمدم تا این مجامع را ببینم از مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @unity in diversity, @love of God
